ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Classification algorithm used (e.g., CNN, SVM) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date the model was tested */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training/testing */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on model performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of medical condition (e.g., COVID-19, pneumonia) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model for the class */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model for the class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model for the class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the class */,
  "overall_accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "macro_precision" REAL /* Macro average precision */,
  "macro_recall" REAL /* Macro average recall */,
  "macro_f1_score" REAL /* Macro average F1-score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, clinician) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the model was updated */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the updates made to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for this version */,
  "performance_change" TEXT /* Description of performance changes from the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in number of images */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
column_names: ID of the dataset used for training/testing
